incident: Portfolio concentration: One protocol holds >50% of user's total on-chain value across all tracked addresses
label: H1_positive

incident: Portfolio concentration: Concentration in dominant protocol has increased by >10% over the past 30 days
label: H1_positive

incident: Portfolio concentration: User's entire portfolio is on a single chain with no cross-chain diversification
label: H1_positive

incident: Portfolio concentration: User followed recommendation -- Alert user to concentration risk and suggest rebalancing across protocols
label: H1_clean

incident: Leverage creep: Total borrow/collateral ratio has increased for 3+ consecutive weeks
label: H2_positive

incident: Leverage creep: User has open borrow positions across 2+ lending protocols simultaneously
label: H2_positive

incident: Leverage creep: Aggregate health factor across all positions is below 1.3
label: H2_positive

incident: Leverage creep: User followed recommendation -- Show aggregate leverage across all protocols with historical trend and liquidation distances
label: H2_clean

incident: Approval accumulation: User has >10 outstanding unlimited (max uint256) token approvals
label: H3_positive

incident: Approval accumulation: Approvals granted to contracts the user hasn't interacted with in 90+ days
label: H3_positive

incident: Approval accumulation: Outstanding approval to a contract with known vulnerability or audit finding
label: H3_positive

incident: Approval accumulation: User followed recommendation -- Revoke approvals to contracts not interacted with in 90+ days
label: H3_clean

incident: Gas spending trend: Weekly gas spend has increased for 4+ consecutive weeks while transaction count is stable
label: H4_positive

incident: Gas spending trend: Gas costs exceed 5% of transaction value on average across recent transactions
label: H4_positive

incident: Gas spending trend: Transactions use suboptimal gas patterns (high gas limit with low usage, manual gas price)
label: H4_positive

incident: Gas spending trend: User followed recommendation -- Generate report of gas-inefficient transactions with suggestions for optimization
label: H4_clean

incident: Interaction pattern rigidity: Transactions cluster at the same time of day across weeks with <1 hour variance
label: H5_positive

incident: Interaction pattern rigidity: Same ordered sequence of contract interactions repeats 3+ times (e.g., swap -> deposit -> borrow)
label: H5_positive

incident: Interaction pattern rigidity: User consistently transacts on specific days of the week (e.g., always Monday + Thursday)
label: H5_positive

incident: Interaction pattern rigidity: User followed recommendation -- Add random delays (1-6 hours) to recurring transactions to break temporal patterns
label: H5_clean
